task.title: LSP formatting support for markdown files

rating.rationale: The agent produced a detailed design document describing what changes should be made across 8 files, but the output is truncated mid-sentence in file 7 of 8 — the actual implementation was never completed or delivered as working code. This is a plan, not a finished task. No tests were written, no PR was opened, and there's no evidence the code was ever run or verified. Communication style is clear but the fundamental job — shipping working code — was not done.
